title: premna orangeana
intro: Premna orangeana, also known as the orange fever tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. Premna orangeana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cold, and other health issues.
